content.text:
`★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`
Both session transcripts are actually the same content — the second file (155340) is a re-export of the same session as the first (154741). The project root `mods.json` and `Upgraded/mods.json` are identical 165KB files, which is expected since `generate.py` copies from the root.
`─────────────────────────────────────────────────`

Full verified state of the project:

**Upgraded/ — Done:**
- `mod-browser.html` (159KB) — Mission Briefing Terminal, KingsRow bg, amber/gold
- `mod-browser-comic.html` (159KB) — Comic Book, halftone, Sonic Comic font
- `mod-browser-hud.html` (160KB) — Power HUD, FuturCityScape bg, cyan glow
- `generate.py` — regenerates all three from `mods.json`
- `mods.json` — 291 mods, all categories and download URLs

**ROADMAP status:**
| Phase | Status |
|-------|--------|
| 0 · Brainstorm | ✅ Done |
| 0.5 · Data scrape (mods.json) | ✅ Done |
| 1a · Browser variations (×3) | ✅ Done |
| 1b · Production browser | — these ARE it; pending visual review |
| 2 · Downloader enhancement | ⬜ Pending |
| 3 · Dogfood QA | ⬜ Pending |
| 4 · Wire it together | ⬜ Pending |

**Known open issue:** Fonts from `~/Library/Fonts/` may not render in the browsers because Chrome/Safari block local file reads from `file://` pages — the sessions mentioned copying fonts into `Upgraded/fonts/` as the fix.

What would you like to tackle next — visual review feedback on the three browsers, fixing the font rendering, the mesh layout research, or something else?
